name: Rail Data
description: Defines movement paths for actors. Units move sequentially between rail points and loop back to the start.

fields.name: Rail ID
fields.description: Identifier for the rail path to which this point belongs.

fields.name: Index
fields.description: The index of this rail point in the sequence.

fields.name: Rail Behavior
fields.description: Defines specific behaviors for movement along the rail.

1.name: End, Loop back
1.description: The rail ends here and leads back to the starting point.

8.name: Jumps Forward
8.description: The actor jumps when he wants to go to the next rail.

16.name: Jumps Backward
16.description: The actor jumps when he wants to go to the last rail.
